overview: Several security issues were fixed in MuPDF.
description:
It was discovered that MuPDF could be made to divide by zero. An attacker
could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2023-51103, CVE-2023-51104, CVE-2023-51105, CVE-2023-51106)

It was discovered that MuPDF incorrectly handled memory under certain
circumstances, which could lead to a NULL pointer dereference. An
attacker could potentially use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2024-46657)

It was discovered that MuPDF could enter an infinite recursion when
parsing certain PDF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to
cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-46206)

could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2023-51103, CVE-2023-51104, CVE-2023-51105, CVE-2023-51106)

It was discovered that MuPDF incorrectly handled memory under certain
circumstances, which could lead to a NULL pointer dereference. An
attacker could potentially use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2024-46657)

It was discovered that MuPDF could enter an infinite recursion when
parsing certain PDF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to
cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-46206)
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7888-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7888-1: MuPDF vulnerabilities

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
25 November 2025

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Several security issues were fixed in MuPDF.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

18.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 mupdf - A lightweight open source software framework for viewing and converting PDF, XPS, and E-book documents
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that MuPDF could be made to divide by zero. An attacker
could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2023-51103, CVE-2023-51104, CVE-2023-51105, CVE-2023-51106)

It was discovered that MuPDF incorrectly handled memory under certain
circumstances, which could lead to a NULL pointer dereference. An
attacker could potentially use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2024-46657)

It was discovered that MuPDF could enter an infinite recursion when
parsing certain PDF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to
cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-46206)

 

 

 

It was discovered that MuPDF could be made to divide by zero. An attacker
could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2023-51103, CVE-2023-51104, CVE-2023-51105, CVE-2023-51106)

It was discovered that MuPDF incorrectly handled memory under certain
circumstances, which could lead to a NULL pointer dereference. An
attacker could potentially use this issue to cause a denial of service.
(CVE-2024-46657)

It was discovered that MuPDF could enter an infinite recursion when
parsing certain PDF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to
cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-46206)

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.04

plucky

 mupdf – 

1.25.1+ds1-5ubuntu0.1

 mupdf-tools – 

1.25.1+ds1-5ubuntu0.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 mupdf – 

1.23.10+ds1-1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 mupdf-tools – 

1.23.10+ds1-1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

LTS jammy

 mupdf – 

1.19.0+ds1-2ubuntu0.1~esm1

 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

1.19.0+ds1-2ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 20.04

LTS focal

1.16.1+ds1-1ubuntu1+esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 mupdf-tools – 

1.16.1+ds1-1ubuntu1+esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 18.04

LTS bionic

1.12.0+ds1-1ubuntu0.1~esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

1.12.0+ds1-1ubuntu0.1~esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
